title: Hakuouki SSL: Sweet School Life the Movie
original_title: 薄桜鬼SSL〜sweet school life〜 THE MOVIE
overview: A live-action theatrical film for Hakuoki SSL, a spin-off of the popular Hakuoki otome game series that re-imagines the cast of Shinsengumi samurai warriors as teachers and students living a peaceful existence in modern Japan.

trailers.title: 薄桜鬼SSL ～sweet school life～ THE MOVIE予告解禁！
